top_findings.title: Archived workspace omits data/kaggle/, so 18/24 tests fail on re-score
top_findings.evidence: .pytest_cache/v/cache/lastfailed lists 18 failing tests (all engine/datasets-fixture tests); data/kaggle/ absent from run_dir; scores.json shows test_coverage=0.3 / defect_rate=0.0 vs authoritative retort.db completed row test_coverage=0.85 / defect_rate=0.68 (finished 2026-04-13)
top_findings.suggestion: Archive the input CSVs (or a fixture subset) with the run, or have conftest skip data-dependent tests when SOCCER_DATA_DIR is unavailable, so the run remains verifiable after archival
